title: حرف الكاف
instruction_en: My little one, write the letter kaaf

items.activity: teachCard - color the letter and picture (ball)
teachCard - color the picture and letter (cherries)
teachCard - color the picture and letter (kangaroo)
teachCard - short vowels (fatha) forms of kaaf shown around treasure chest
teachCard - picture card with letter ك (cake)
teachCard - picture card with letter ك (book)
teachCard - picture card with letter ك (kangaroo)
traceLetter - dotted isolated forms grid; example كَلْب (dog)
traceLetter - large model letter then dotted trace rows; instruction صغيري أكتب حرف الكاف
traceLetter - dotted grid with header pictures كُرَة / كَرَز
letterPositionTable - mark position of ك in each word (dog, cup, fish)
writeLetter / letterPositionTable - forms table (منفرد/بداية/وسط/نهاية) with examples كُرْسِيّ، يَكْتُب، يَضْحَك; trace rows for ك ك ـكـ ـك
circleLetter - circle every letter ك among many letters; instruction قِف بالتلوين الأحمر على كل حرف (ك)

notes: 16 images total; 12 PNG read by sight, 4 unviewable (.wmf: m005, m006, m015, m016) - flagged and skipped. Worksheet teaches letter kaaf (ك). m001 = large stroke-order trace letter (kaaf with arrows). m002 = circle/color-all-kaaf activity among scattered letters (instruction read by sight: 'put red color on every kaaf', medium confidence on exact wording). m003 = intro teach page with كُرَة, كَرَز, كَنْغَر; bottom row lists example words بداية حرف الكاف: كَلْب كَوْخ كُرْسِيّ شُبّاك دُكّان كَعْكَة. m004 = short-vowel (fatha) forms of kaaf around treasure with word كَنْز. m007-m009 = picture flashcards (كَعْكَة، كِتاب، كَنْغَر). m010 = trace grid, example كَلْب. m011-m012 = trace practice sheets. m013 = letter-position table cards (سمكة، كأس، كلب). m014 = twinkl forms/position table + trace rows with examples كرسي، يكتب، يضحك. Forms shown across worksheet: isolated ك, initial كـ, medial ـكـ, final ـك. Vowel diacritics on some vocab inferred from standard spelling - medium confidence on exact harakat.
